name: Easy Lamb Creole Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven; dust the lamb riblets with flour and brown on all sides in hot oil.
2. Drain fat from the pan; add tomatoes, broth, wine, parsley, lemon slices, and seasonings.
3. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
4. Add okra and peas; cook, covered, for 10 to 15 minutes.
NOTE: Meat may be removed from bones before serving. This gumbo freezes well.
